MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Answer
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexandria Carraher, Esq. (415-491-8900 x114) of Scheer Law Group for Defendant/Moving party PGB.
No other Appearance.

Defendant/Moving party does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PGB, LLC's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Answer is GRANTED. Amended answer shall be filed and served forthwith. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
